## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Connect device / perform action
3. Observe error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- **Rust**: `rustc --version`
